title: G2PLUS Merry Christmas Burlap Bunting Banner, 4.8M Banner with Snowflake, Vintage Merry Christmas Garland with 14 Pennants, Rustic Hessian Bunting
features: 【Material】The burlap Merry Christmas banner is made of top quality thick hessian burlap material, which has a rustic look and will last for many more gatherings. The burlap christmas banner will looks beautiful hanging from your mantle. If you are going for a country style, this is for you.

【Nice Design】The christmas burlap banner are printed with snowflake and letters"MERRY CHRISTMAS" in red and green, which is super cute and goes perfect with your farmhouse/rustic Christmas theme. It will be the finishing touch to your Christmas decor!

【Package include】You'll get the christmas bunting being in two parts/strings, 1 "MERRY" Banner with 5PCS Pennants + 1 "CHRISTMAS" Banner with 9PCS Pennants. The Merry Christmas Banner can be hung in a variety of places, and fit quite nicely.

【Easy to Hang up】The christmas banner is in two pieces on a matching twine, the banner "MERRY" is 2m and the "CHRISTMAS" is 2.8M. The rustic christmas banner stands out and it is very sturdy. Easy to unfold and hang. You may hang separately or join together for one long banner.

【Pecfect Decoration to Christmas】 The burlap christmas banner will looks beautiful hanging from your mantle/living room windows or the wall behind dining table. The bright lettering, burlap fiber gives it a homey touch. makes such a difference to the Christmas party, bring a real sense of elegance and class to your christmas.
